> India's premium mobile app, web & SaaS development studio. We build digital products that drive measurable business growth.

## Key Metrics
- 150+ projects shipped
- 98% client retention rate
- 12–16 week delivery from signed contract to live product
- 6-month free bug-fix warranty on every project
- 40+ senior engineers
- 8+ years of excellence

## About
CodeX Tech Innovations & Consultants LLP (CODEX) is a Bengaluru-based software development studio. We build mobile apps, web platforms, SaaS products, cloud infrastructure, and AI solutions. Every project is handled by senior engineers with fixed-price contracts, full source code ownership, and a 6-month free warranty.

## Services
- Mobile App Development — iOS & Android (React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin)
- Web Development — React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript
- SaaS Product Development — Multi-tenant architecture, subscription billing
- Cloud & DevOps Engineering — AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform
- AI & Intelligent Automation — OpenAI, LangChain, TensorFlow, RAG, Fine-tuning
- UI/UX Design — Figma prototypes, user research, design systems
- Product Analytics & CRO — Mixpanel, Amplitude, A/B testing, funnel analysis

## Products
- PG Management System — Property Tech
- Hotel Management System — Hospitality Tech
- Hostel Management System — Education Tech
- Compliance & CA Manager — FinTech
- Store Management System — Retail Tech
- OMF Food Delivery App — Food Tech
- Wroggle Clothing Store — Fashion Tech
- Arthomed Hospital System — Health Tech

## Technology Stack
- Mobile: React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin, Expo, Capacitor
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Redux
- Backend: Node.js, Python, Go, Java Spring, GraphQL, REST APIs
- Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, MySQL, Supabase, Prisma
- Cloud: AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Firebase, Vercel, Cloudflare
- DevOps & AI: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform, OpenAI, LangChain

## Industries
E-Commerce & Retail · Healthcare & MedTech · Fintech & Payments · EdTech & E-Learning · Real Estate & PropTech · Logistics & Supply Chain · Enterprise SaaS · Gaming & Entertainment

## How We Work
1. Discovery & Audit (Week 1–2)
2. Strategy & Blueprint (Week 2–3)
3. UI/UX Design (Week 3–6)
4. Agile Development (Week 6–16)
5. QA & Performance (Week 14–16)
6. Launch & Scale (Week 16+)

## Differentiators
- Senior engineers only (5+ years experience)
- Fixed-price contracts (no scope creep)
- Full source code ownership
- 12–16 week delivery
- Dedicated project manager
- 6-month free warranty
